action.reasoning: Observation: torch_scatter import causes std::bad_alloc with torch 2.11. The pre-installed torch_scatter binaries are likely incompatible with this torch version. Analysis: I need to avoid torch_scatter/torch_sparse and use pure PyTorch + torch_geometric ops. torch_geometric core itself might still work without scatter compiled extensions (it has fallback to torch.scatter_add). Let me check if torch_geometric works without torch_scatter. Decision: Run test_import without torch_scatter to see what's available; build model using pure pytorch scatter operations.
